posts.text:
God bless you, Colin.  

What a legend.
nitter.net/SamKnoxTV/status/20344…


Sam Knox (@SamKnoxTV)

Colin Dorgan reflects on the support his team has given him after he lost his mother, brother and grandfather last month. 

He scored the game-tying goal with less than a minute to play to send the game to OT.

 His team went on to win 3-2 in 4OT. @wpri12

Video
  





— https://nitter.net/SamKnoxTV/status/2034418737915277805#m

A truly amazing high school sports story.

Colin Dorgan's mother, brother, and grandfather were killed by his trans father in last month's shooting in Rhode Island.

He scored the game winning goal in the state semifinals and the game tying goal in the championship.

His team ended up winning in 4 OTs.


NBC 10 WJAR (@NBC10)

Blackstone Valley Schools hockey team's Colin Dorgan tied the game with 30 seconds left in the DII championship game. 
bit.ly/4uCMTY7

Video
  





— https://nitter.net/NB

The picture on the left is the old Seven Mile Bridge in Key West that was built a century ago and has been decommissioned since its replacement was built in 1980.

Newsom's moronic staffers think that's somehow similar to the $100M 'wildlife bridge' they've failed to build.


Governor Newsom Press Office (@GovPressOffice)

How is Florida a real place?

How is Texas a real place?

See, we can do it too…







— https://nitter.net/GovPressOffice/status/2034397373410283932#m

People like to claim that Gavin Newsom will be a formidable candidate for President, but his future run will be complicated by simple observations like "You've spent $100B+ tax dollars on a train that hasn't been built, another $100M+ on a 'wildlife crossing' to nowhere, and nearly $50B on a homelessness problem that has only gotten worse."


End Wokeness (@EndWokeness)

California already spent $114 million on this unfinished wildlife crossing bridge (leading nowhere)

Video

Raskin: "Thomas Paine was an undocumented immigrant."

Jordan: "How was he an illegal immigrant? He was born in the UK and came to America, then a British colony."

Raskin: "I didn't say he was an illegal immigrant. He was an undocumented immigrant."

Video

VANCE: "The biggest dividing line in our country is we have in Washington DC, one political movement that is dedicated to fraud and illegal immigration and to making sure that this country is safe for them-- rather than safe for us."

Video

What exactly was Rand attempting to prove by playing the clip of Markwayne Mullin challenging Sean O'Brien to a fight from three years ago when the guy is literally sitting right behind Mullin supporting his nomination?

Video
Okay Venezuela may have beaten us at baseball but we're still taking their oil

BRYCE HARPER.

For the United States of America. 🇺🇸

Video

🚨 Republicans just won a special election in Virginia HD-98.

Republican Andrew Rice is currently ahead+29 in a district that was Sears+7 in November.

A 22 point swing to the GOP.
Charlie Kirk was killed in an act of left-wing domestic terroris.
The left hated Charlie Kirk because he told them the truth.
RIP Charlie
#greenscreen
Donald J. Trump is your President. 🇺🇸
A moment I will never forget. #fyp #trump2024 #maga
